hotel_name: Hilton Garden Inn Hà Nội (Hilton Garden Inn Hanoi)

reviews.title: Property very old and worn out. The front desk receptionist was not friendly.
reviews.text: The rooms was smell body odor and the bathroom sink …. Really old and barely working. That’s a shame that when you travel aboard you relying on the Hilton name and standards. Not coming back for sure

reviews.title: good comfortable.
reviews.positives: breakfast spread was very limited Orange juice was canned & NOT freshly Squeezed , Location was v good.  at this price point they should have more spread
reviews.negatives: breakfast

reviews.title: Inflexible and not helpful
reviews.text: What is not flexible is late check out to 2pm when I have to leave amounts to charge at 50% of rates booked.
reviews.room_type: King Bed Suite with Living Room

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Buffet

Restaurante

reviews.title: Just a business hotel
reviews.positives: Location, room size, amenity

reviews.title: We enjoyed Hanoi & Hilton Garden Inn is ok for the price we paid.
reviews.positives: Central location
reviews.negatives: Booking.com - confusing terms when booking 2 rooms like breakfast for one room only thinking that it is complimentary breakfast but actually not.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Not at all worth the price, poor facilities.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Ankit,

Warm greetings from Hilton Garden Inn Hanoi!

We are deeply sorry that your experience at our hotel did not fully reflect our high standards. Please accept our sincerest apologies for all the inconvenience have caused and rest assured that your feedback has already been addressed with the relevant department.
Besides that, we also would like to hear more details about your experience so we could improve our hotel service. 

Although we fell short of meeting your expectations during your stay, we hope you will consider our hotel on your next visit to the area so that we can deliver on the guest experience you deserve.

Sincerely,
Chi Le
Guest Service Manager

reviews.title: best location in Hanoi
reviews.positives: location and laundry services
reviews.negatives: housekeeping needs to improve

reviews.title: Hotel is not customer concern at all
reviews.text:
Essential toiletries need to call housekeeping. 
Room and reception have No umbrella available even on raining days.  Request to purchase one from hotel..

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.positives: Great location near (short walk) Philippine embassy

reviews.title: not as good as what i expected
reviews.positives: not satisfied

reviews.title: Nice stay, good service
reviews.positives: Everything, restaurant

reviews.title: Quiet vicinity with limited facilities
reviews.text: Good business hotel but not quite for travel. Quiet area which is peaceful but tad far from old quarters etc
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. We sincerely apologize that certain aspects of your experience, such as the location relative to the Old Quarter, did not fully meet your expectations.

We truly value your comments and will use them to continue improving our services and facilities. It is our hope that we may have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide a stay that better reflects the high standards we strive to offer.

Warm regards,
Cuong Le
General Manager
Hilton Garden Inn Hanoi

reviews.title: Thank you for making our stay in our birth country memorable.
reviews.positives: The staff are exemplary and the location is ideal, close to restaurants (bún chả Obama, chicken pho …) and street food vendors.
reviews.negatives: The suite room size which is very small for a suite.  It’s much smaller than the suite in Melia hotel.

reviews.title: Not happy
reviews.text: There is no way to cancel the hotel booking once a mistake is made. Too late
reviews.response:
Dear SAY,

Warm greetings from Hilton Garden Inn Hanoi! 

Thank you for taking the time to communicate with us why our services did not meet your expectations. On behalf of the team, please accept our sincere apology for any inconvenience caused during your stay.
Although we fell short of meeting your expectations, we hope you will consider our hotel on your next visit to the area so that we can deliver on the guest experience you deserve.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you have any further assistance.

Kind regards,

Chi Le - Guest Service Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: El restaurante, habitacion y servicio muy bueno.
reviews.negatives:
La tina de baño esta peligrosa para salir y entrar esta muy alta y no hay suficientes barandales.

Las habitaciones tienen alfombra, por alergias e higiene yo recomendaria cambiar a piso o duela.

reviews.title: Moved to Hilton Opera
reviews.text: I booked this hotel on Agoda but when I got there and checked out the room I ended up moving to Hilton Opera Hotel. More expensive but so much better with staff location and overall upkeep of hotel than Hilton Garden Inn.
reviews.positives: I did not like it

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Établissement vieillissant, et mal entretenu

reviews.title: Old Hotel
reviews.text: Is clean but hotel old and can consider not much facility at all.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nous sommes tres contents avec L’Equipe de l’hotel
reviews.negatives: Early check-in est un catastrophe: prix d’une nuit pour l’arrivee a 7h et sans petit-dejeuner !

reviews.title: Basic hotel
reviews.text: Not much to tell, for the rates offer it not worth!

reviews.title: Emplacement au calme et excellentes prestations
reviews.positives:
L'amabilité du personnel , le calme ( quartier des ambassades et double vitrage ), l'emplacement est idéal pour ne pas subir le brouhaha de la vieille ville qui n'est qu'à un quart d'heure à pied et de surcroit le trajet est plaisant ( batiments , boutiques..).
Le petit déjeuner est parfait.
reviews.negatives: Pas de  piscine mais il y a tant à faire dans la charmante ville d'Hanoï.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text: Hotel needs modernization, no help with bags on entering hotel and leaving. No real amenities in room, if you wanted them you had to ring reception, no mini bar had to go down to the shop in lobby, rooms dated , not what you expect from the Hilton but charging Hilton prices , wouldn’t recommend
reviews.response:
Dear Claire,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We’re sorry to hear that your stay did not meet your expectations. Your feedback is valuable, and we appreciate you bringing these concerns to our attention.

Regarding the bell service and in-room minibar, we would like to share some brand information with you. Each Hilton property follows specific brand standards, and all Hilton Garden Inn hotels worldwide adhere to these guidelines. Based on this, bell service is not a standard offering at Hilton Garden Inn hotels. However, our team is always happy to assist you and all our guests whenever needed.
Instead of an in-room minibar, the Hilton Garden Inn brand features The Shop, a small convenience store available in the lobby for your convenience.

We strive to provide a high-quality experience for all our guests, and it’s clear that we fell short during your visit. Please know that we take your comments seriously and will review them with our team as we work to improve our se

reviews.title: Agréable, grand plaisir pour les petits déjeuners et le restaurant.
reviews.positives: La cuisine est excellente ! Le personnel est serviable et efficace.
reviews.negatives: Nous avons demandé une chambre triple, mais on a eu une chambre double avec extra bed, qui est moins confortable. Et puis on a dû changer de chambre quand on a prolongé notre séjour.

reviews.title: Kind review
reviews.text: Food for breakfast should be more choice and expensive . Please consider the pricing
reviews.response:
Dear Mr/Ms Say,

Warmest greetings from Hilton Garden Inn Hanoi!

Thank you for taking the time to communicate with us why our services did not meet your expectations.

We have shared your feedback about the breakfast with the leadership team, in particular the hotel's chefs to review the possibilities of improvement. 
Again, we highly appreciate your feedback as it will assist us in becoming better at what we do and allow us to reiterate our sincere apologies for the inconvenience.

Although we fell short of meeting your expectations during your stay, we hope you will consider our hotel on your next visit to the area so that we can deliver on the guest experience you deserve.

Sincerely,

Chi Le
Guest Service Manager

reviews.title: Très bon rapport/qualité.
reviews.positives: Personnel professionnel et fort aimable. Chambre spacieuse. Litterie comfortable.  Chambre bien insonorisee. Ça compense largement la distance raisonable du vieux quartier de Hanoi.
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Over-priced and outdated Hilton product
reviews.text: The property is unfortunately dated and not worth the price especially when there are better options elsewhere in the Old Quarter. The City View room is essentially facing the back view of a neighboring residential complex which is less than 15 meters away. The TV in the room looks more like a desktop monitor and  was not even working.

reviews.title: Très bon séjour
reviews.positives: Un service très qualitatif.

reviews.title: too expensive for a town hotel
reviews.text: chose this hotel as i have a meeting here...i think it is overprice but all in all the facilities and service is quite good...but i think i could get the same thing at other hotels in hanoi...however to put a note, there is a halal outlet nearby. Anyway, i hope the agoda management will state if hotel is a smoke free to help people make decisions expecially smokers

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Zu teuer für die Qualität.

reviews.title: No frills hotel
reviews.text:
No bell boy, no dental kit, empty fridge, poor internet.
No additional comments !!!!!!
reviews.positives: Breakfast, F&B staff

reviews.title: Goed hotel een stukje lopen vanuit het centrum
reviews.positives: Het personeel was heel vriendelijk, het hotel ligt bijna een half uur lopen uit het centrum maar daarom wel heel rustig. Geen last van straatgeluiden of uitgaanspubliek, dus prima. Het ontbijt was prima verzorgd. De kamers schoon en netjes
reviews.negatives: Niets

reviews.title: Bathroom
reviews.text: To take shower in the bathtub is so dangerous I almost slipped and fell each time I shower. Should put a mat in the bathtub. It’s dangerous
reviews.response:
Dear Chin,

Warm greetings from Hilton Garden Inn Hanoi! 
Thank you for taking the time to complete the on-line questionnaire relating to your recent stay with us.

We have shared your feedback with the leadership team to ensure the necessary guidelines are in place and reviewed to prevent the similar case from occurring in the future. Please rest assured that we keep working to uphold our commitment to deliver exceptional service to every guest.

Although we fell short of meeting your expectations during your stay, we hope you will consider our hotel on your next visit to the area so that we can deliver on the guest experience you deserve.

In the meantime, please let us know if you have any further assistance.

Kind regards,

Chi Le - Guest Service Manager

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: 朝食が美味しかった
reviews.negatives: 南京虫にやられた。最悪です。

reviews.title: a smoke free and overprice town hotel
reviews.text: chose this hotel as i have a meeting here...i think it is overprice but all in all the facilities and service is quite good...but i think i could get the same thing at other hotels in hanoi...however to put a note, there is a halal outlet nearby. Anyway, i hope the agoda management will state if hotel is a smoke free to help people make decisions especially smokers

reviews.title: Acceptable.
reviews.positives: 朝食は美味しかったです。Staycation Planに含まれている夕食も、ラインナップが充実しており助かりました。また、スタッフの方々は愛想が良く、気持ちよく接することができました。ロケーションも、市内中心地に近く便利です。
reviews.negatives: 部屋の無料wifiが頻繁に切断され、執務の支障となりました。それほど多くのデータ通信を行っているわけではないのですが、一度切断されると暫く再接続できないため、かなり困りました。有料プランを使えば解消されるのか否かもよく分からないため、有料プランの申し込みにも躊躇があります。また、清掃後の部屋が消毒液（？）の臭いが強く、やや不快感がありました。

reviews.title: Nice without character
reviews.text:
Had a mixed experience with this hotel. By no means is a bad hotel but not quite a memorable one either. 

Location wasn't too bad, about a 20-30 minute easy walk to the Old Quarter. 
Room was very clean and comfortable but shower needed work as it was impossible to shower without getting the whole bathroom wet. Otherwise nice strong air conditioning (which was very much needed in the Hanoi heat) 

I booked the room for 1 guest but for a king size bed. Upon check in they realized that I was also traveling with my partner and for this we were asked to pay a fee for an extra person per night we stayed. This did not amount to much but never have I encountered such a situation in an international hotel. Would have been my fault for booking only for one guest when there were two of us. My understanding was 1-2 guests per room has always been the same price. Perhaps it's a hotel policy which I didn't understand. 

Overall a pretty average stay. By no means a bad one but we also stayed in another hotel which was half the price of this hotel but with much better service and a much better location in Hanoi.
reviews.positives: Free laundry service, clean rooms, comfortable bed

reviews.title: 快適でした
reviews.positives:
朝食がおいしかった。
混みすぎず、メニューの数も多すぎず少なすぎず、クオリティもいい。
reviews.negatives: 特になし

reviews.title: It is a great location hotel compare to other 5 st
reviews.positives: location, room rate and staff perfomance. I receive a free upgraded.

reviews.title: 概ね快適でよかった。
reviews.positives: 旧市街に近いロケーションで便利。徒歩でハノイの主な観光スポットに行ける。朝食の種類は多くないが、美味しく、スタッフが丁寧にに接客してくれて、ゆったりと朝食をとることができた。チェックアウト後、料金固定のタクシーを呼んでくれて、安心して空港に行くことができた。
reviews.negatives: アメニティーが石鹸、シャンプー・リンス、歯磨き等の最小限しか無い。もっと充実した方が良い。料金は高めの設定。

reviews.title: Clean simple hotel,
reviews.text: OK, simple hotel with limited services. Clean and good location.
reviews.positives: Locatio, clean and price.

reviews.title: Excellent！
reviews.positives:
朝食がとてもおいしかったです。
中心街にあるのに驚くほど部屋が静かでよく眠ることができました。
フライトのオンラインチェックインの時にフロントの方に親切に対応していただきました。
reviews.negatives:
アイロンはクローゼットの上方にあったので風呂上りに少し探してしまいました。わかりやすいところにおいてあると、風呂上がりに探さなくて助かります。
アメニティは部屋に設置していただいたほうがいいと思います。

reviews.title: Good for Embasy use
reviews.text:
There was little option for food, pizza, pho, and small internal Restraunt menu.
No pool, no deck to sit outside, fitnesses center small. 
The staff was very friendly and helpful
reviews.room_type: King Bed Suite with Living Room

reviews.title: 満足
reviews.positives: フロントの人が非常に親切で英語がうまかった。ベトナム人でこんなに英語がうまい人はあまりいない。
reviews.negatives:
１．トイレの便器とバスタブの間が狭く、大便をしにくい
２．ランドリーサービスを使った。選択された衣服がビニールで包装されず裸で返される

reviews.title: Good Hotel
reviews.text:
The hotel is located at walking distance from most interesting places in center city. It is worth mentioning that there two Hilton Hotels in Hanoi, so make sure you reserve the one you want.
The room I stayed was clean and I think a bit small for the price.
The members of the staff were Ok in helping when needed.
I did not have a chance to use the gym or pool.

reviews.title: 還是屬於可以的飯店
reviews.positives: 飯店人員都很親切 早餐好吃 有免費的洗衣機烘衣機可以使用超級棒
reviews.negatives: 飯店比較老舊 比較有味道 房間內的設備大多比較舊 床被乾淨但床有點睡塌了 應該要換新

reviews.title: A bit stale but good comfort
reviews.text: Overall, very comfortable. Staff were extremely helpful. Location not as central but was nice to be out of the craziness (where we stayed previously). The breakfast is just so so and decor also not amazing.
reviews.positives: Comfort, staff and quietness

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 员工很周到热情，早餐好吃，位置方便
reviews.negatives: 设施陈旧，淋浴设施难操作，水压低，水温不够热

reviews.title: The bed on summer very hot when sleeping.
reviews.text: Nobody help me to carry my luggage when i arrived hotel. Same like they dont have anybody stand by the door.
reviews.positives: Location, serivce, clean.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: צוות נחמד ומאוד אדיב. שקט, נוח ונקי.
